paths.name: child_process
paths.message: exec/execSync ALWAYS run a shell — use execFileSync(file, argv) or SafeExecutor from @claude-flow/security instead. See ADR-078.

paths.name: child_process
paths.message: Top-level require('child_process') makes shell-vs-no-shell invisible. Use named imports of execFileSync / execFile / spawn (no shell). See ADR-078.
